title: brachyscome campylocarpa
intro: Brachyscome campylocarpa is a flowering plant species native to Australia, belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as its possible anti-bacterial properties. In herbal preparations, Brachyscome campylocarpa is often used in the form of a tincture or infused oil, which can be applied topically to affected areas.
